name: Neural Population Dynamics Simulator
description: Monte Carlo simulation of stochastic firing patterns in neural populations, modeling synaptic noise, neural variability, and emergent network dynamics.
problem_statement: Neural populations exhibit complex stochastic dynamics that are difficult to study experimentally. How can we simulate realistic population activity?
technical_approach: Gillespie algorithm for exact stochastic simulation. Poisson spiking models with refractory periods. Correlated noise injection and mean-field approximations for large-scale networks.
